description_long: This sculpture depicts an abstract, elongated animal form, most closely resembling a giraffe with its long neck gracefully arched backward. The body is slender and stylized, with legs that are fused together and a smooth, continuous surface. The head is small and delicately shaped, with the mouth reaching toward the back, creating a looped silhouette. The sculpture stands on a simple, rectangular base that provides stability. The surface texture appears rough and stone-like, with a weathered, matte finish. The coloration is a uniform earthy beige, suggesting it is made from stone or a similar material.
description: An abstract, elongated giraffe-like sculpture with a looping neck and rough, stone-textured surface, standing on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full looping neck and the slender, fused legs, with the head arched backward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the body and the pronounced curve of the neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the neck loop and the narrow, textured body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the verticality and the smooth, continuous lines of the sculpture.
attribute_subject_matter: abstract animal form resembling a giraffe
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an outdoor urban plaza, park, or public walkway.
